task_description: Build an AWS Ground Station demonstrator as a modular Terraform project for receiving NOAA-20 (JPSS-1) satellite data via S3 Data Delivery. Includes S3 reception infrastructure, Mission Profile configuration, automated Contact Scheduler Lambda, optional processing pipeline, CloudWatch observability, IAM security, and reproducible deployment.

verification.summary: terraform fmt -check -recursive passes (no formatting issues), terraform init succeeds (providers downloaded), terraform validate reports configuration is valid, python3 -m py_compile passes on both Lambda files. No Dockerfile in project so docker_build is skipped. No unit tests as this is a Terraform infrastructure project validated via terraform validate.
